title: athyrium mettenianum var. isobasis
intro: Athyrium mettenianum var. isobasis, commonly known as Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus, native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, promoting antioxidant activity, and supporting immune function. The therapeutic actions of Lady fern include its use in traditional medicine to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The bioactive constituents of Athyrium mettenianum var. isobasis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
